debug_info.goal:
K : Type u
inst✝¹ : Category.{v, u} K
inst✝ : InfinityCosmos K
X Y X' Y' : K
f : X ↠ Y
g : X' ↠ Y'
⊢ IsIsofibration (prod.map ↑f ↑g)

rw [prod.map_id_comp_prod_map]
  apply comp_isIsofibration
  · apply pullback_isIsofibration f.1 prod.fst _ _
    exact IsPullback.mk (by simp) (IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift s.fst (s.snd ≫ prod.snd))
      (by simp) (by simp) (fun s m h1 h2 => by ext; exact h1; simpa using h2))
  · apply pullback_isIsofibration g.1 prod.snd _ _
    exact IsPullback.mk (by simp) (IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift (s.snd ≫ prod.fst) s.fst)
      (by simp) (by simp) (fun s m h1 h2 => by ext; simpa using h1; exact h2))

        (by intros; apply prod.hom_ext <;> simp [← h])))
  have h₂ : IsIsofibration (prod.map (𝟙 Y) g.1) :=
    pullback_isIsofibration prod.snd _ g.1 _ (IsPullback.mk (prod.map_snd _ _)
      (IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift (s.snd ≫ prod.fst) s.fst) (by simp)
        (by intros; apply prod.hom_ext <;> simp [← h])))
  exact comp_isIsofibration ⟨_, h₁⟩ ⟨_, h₂⟩

    apply pullback_isIsofibration prod.fst _ f.1 prod.fst (by simp)
    refine IsPullback.mk (by simp) (PullbackCone.IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift s.fst (s.snd ≫ prod.snd)) (by simp) (fun s => ?_) (fun s m h1 h2 => ?_))
    · apply prod.hom_ext <;> simp; exact s.condition.symm
    · apply prod.hom_ext <;> simp [h1]
      rw [← prod.map_snd, Category.assoc, h2, Category.comp_id]
  let h2 : IsIsofibration (prod.map (𝟙 Y) g.1) := by
    apply pullback_isIsofibration prod.snd _ g.1 prod.snd (by simp)
    refine IsPullback.mk (by simp) (PullbackCone.IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift (s.snd ≫ prod.fst) s.fst) (by simp) (fun s => ?_) (fun s m h1 h2 => ?_))
    · apply prod.hom_ext <;> simp; exact s.condition.symm
    · apply prod.hom_ext <;> simp [h1]
      rw [← prod.map_fst, Category.assoc, h2, Category.comp_id]
  rw [← Category.comp_id f.1, ← Category.id_comp g.1, prod.map_comp]
  exact comp_isIsofibration ⟨_, h1⟩ ⟨_, h2⟩

  · apply pullback_isIsofibration g prod.snd _ _
    refine IsPullback.mk (by simp) (IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift (s.fst ≫ prod.fst) s.snd) (by simp) (by simp) ?_)

rw [← prod.map_comp_id]
  apply comp_isIsofibration ⟨_, ?_⟩ ⟨_, ?_⟩
  · refine pullback_isIsofibration f _ _ _ (IsPullback.mk (prod.map_fst f.1 (𝟙 X')) ?_)
    exact IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift (s.π.app WalkingCospan.right) (s.π.app WalkingCospan.left ≫ prod.snd))
      (fun s => by
        dsimp; rintro (_|_|_) <;> simp
        · rw [prod.lift_map, comp_id, prod.lift_snd]
        · apply prod.lift_fst)
      (fun s m h => by
        apply prod.hom_ext
        · simpa using h WalkingCospan.right
        · simpa [prod.map_snd] using h WalkingCospan.left)
  · refine pullback_isIsofibration g _ _ _ (IsPullback.mk (prod.map_snd (𝟙 Y) g.1) ?_)
    exact IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift (s.π.app WalkingCospan.left ≫ prod.fst) (s.π.app WalkingCospan.right))
      (fun s => by
        dsimp; rintro (_|_|_) <;> simp
        · rw [prod.lift_map, id_comp, prod.lift_fst]
        · apply prod.lift_snd)
      (fun s m h => by
        apply prod.hom_ext
        · simpa [prod.map_fst] using h WalkingCospan.left
        · simpa using h WalkingCospan.right)

have : prod.map f.1 g.1 = prod.map f.1 (𝟙 X') ≫ prod.map (𝟙 Y) g.1 := by ext <;> simp
  rw [this]
  apply comp_isIsofibration
  · refine pullback_isIsofibration prod.fst _ f.1 prod.fst ?_ f.2
    refine IsPullback.mk (by simp) ?_
    refine PullbackCone.IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift (PullbackCone.fst s) (PullbackCone.snd s ≫ prod.snd)) (by simp) (by simp) ?_
    intro s m h1 h2; ext; exact h1; simpa using h2
  · refine pullback_isIsofibration prod.snd _ g.1 prod.snd ?_ g.2
    refine IsPullback.mk (by simp) ?_
    refine PullbackCone.IsLimit.mk _ (fun s => prod.lift (PullbackCone.snd s ≫ prod.fst) (PullbackCone.fst s)) (by simp) (by simp) ?_
    intro s m h1 h2; ext; simpa using h2; exact h1
